heading: Return Value
body:
The `collection.deleteMany()` method returns a [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise) that
resolves to a document that describes the delete operation.

```typescript
Promise<object>
```

| Value               | Type   | Description                                                                          |
| ------------------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| result.deletedCount | number | The number of documents in the collection that were deleted by the delete operation. |
